---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for InfraProbe
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem statement

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve.

> Example: "I'm always frustrated when I have to manually ..."

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like, including any CLI flags, config options, or API changes.

## Example usage

```bash
# How the feature would be invoked
infraprobe <new-command> --flag value
```

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered and why they fall short.

## Additional context

- Related issues or discussions:
- Links to relevant documentation or tools:
- Mockups / diagrams (if applicable):

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Tests added
